qa_pairs.question: What are the available H100 Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) profiles and their corresponding computing power and memory specifications?
qa_pairs.answer: The available H100 MIG profiles are: H100-1g.10gb, which offers 1/8th of the computing power with 10GB of GPU memory; H100-2g.20gb, providing 2/8th of the computing power with 20GB of GPU memory; and H100-3g.40gb, which gives 3/8th of the computing power with 40GB of GPU memory.

qa_pairs.question: How do less powerful Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) profiles affect a user's allocation and priority on the cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Using less powerful Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) profiles will have a lower impact on your allocation and priority.

qa_pairs.question: What command can be used to list all the available Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) flavours and full-size GPU names on a given cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: To list all the available Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) flavours and full-size GPU names on a given cluster, you can run the command: `sinfo -o "%G"|grep gpu|sed 's/gpu://g'|sed 's/),/\n/g'|cut -d: -f1|sort|uniq`.
